- created in 2024: not_visible (no repo/date metadata shown)

uncertainty:

task_context.task: navigate: Search for an open-source project related to 'virtual assistants' on GitHub that has been created in 2024.
task_context.title: Repository search results · GitHub

args.query: GitHub repository search for an open-source virtual assistants project in 2024 yielded 0 repository results because the query was too broad/malformed and no repository result card appeared

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

args.query: GitHub search task empty repository results due to broad query and missing creation year 2024 filter; decide between inefficient_search and early_terminated

args.expected_behavior: The agent should have used GitHub search/filter controls to narrow results toward an open-source repository related to virtual assistants and then verified the 2024 creation constraint before stopping.
args.actual_behavior: The agent submitted a broad natural-language query ('open-source project related to virtual assistants') that produced 0 repository results, then scrolled once and exited without applying any year or repository-specific narrowing filters or finding a qualifying project.
args.regression_rule: When a search task has explicit qualifiers like project type and creation year, start with task-specific repository terms and use filters/advanced search to enforce the constraints before concluding the search.

evidence.claim: The task required finding an open-source GitHub project related to virtual assistants created in 2024.
The entered query was broad/natural-language: 'open-source project related to 'virtual assistants''.
Repository search results showed 'Your search did not match any repositories' and only issues/PR matches, not a repository card.
High-detail inspection confirms 0 repository results, no repository result cards, and that the 2024 creation constraint was not visible or checked.
The agent exited at step 5 without reaching any qualifying project or applying year-based filtering.
A curated precedent for broad browsing instead of using search/filter controls is relevant.

suggested_followups.label: Show filters
suggested_followups.message: Would you like me to inspect whether GitHub’s repository filters or advanced search could have been used here?

suggested_followups.label: Check 2024 qualifier
suggested_followups.message: Should I verify whether any repository result explicitly showed a 2024 creation date?
